name: pricing-table-01
title: Pricing Table 01
author: ilinxa
description: Side-by-side pricing tier cards (2–4 tiers) with optional monthly/annual toggle, highlighted-tier badge, per-feature included rows with tooltips, and a feature-comparison table layout. Controlled-or-uncontrolled toggle state, full i18n bag, three tones, RTL-safe. CTAs accept ReactNode (consumer wraps with router primitive) OR a CtaSpec convenience overload.
